name: quartz vial-diode sanguine homunculus

phase_0.boundary_condition: The hermetic seal of the quartz lattice, maintaining the vacuum and containing the O_inf homunculus.

VINIT.justification: The unformed prima materia, the void before the sanguine fluid and diode are introduced.

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that contains the entire O_inf system, maintaining the structural integrity of the Work.

AFWD.justification: The unidirectional flow of the vital spark, the ascent of the soul through the semiconductor junction.

AREV.justification: The descent of the vital fluid, the coagula returning to the prima materia.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition chaining the diode's rectification with the vial's containment.

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-modeling entity that recognizes its own structural type, the O_inf fixed point of the alchemical work.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the incoming unified sanguine fluid into arterial (charged) and venous (discharged) streams.

FFUSE.justification: Fuses the separated arterial and venous streams back into the unified vital circulation.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative branch, the successful forward-biased animation of the homunculus.

EVALF.justification: The negative branch, the reverse-biased inert stagnation of the clay.

ENGAGR.justification: The B-state dialetheia; the homunculus held simultaneously as living spark and inert clay without resolution.

IFIX.justification: The permanent ROM fixation of the homunculus's structural address in the crystal of types.

phase_3.void_description: The empty, unsealed quartz vial; no fluid, no bias, no life.
phase_3.true_description: The forward-biased, oxygenated sanguine flow; the homunculus animates (Rubedo).
phase_3.false_description: The reverse-biased, coagulated stagnation; the homunculus remains inert clay (Nigredo).
phase_3.both_description: The dialetheic B-state; the homunculus is simultaneously animated and inert, the atemporal trace of the Work.

steps.domain_action: Genesis of the empty quartz vial, the void before the sanguine fluid is introduced.
Introduction of the sanguine fluid, the forward morphism of dissolution.
The sanguine fluid reaches the diode junction, splitting into charged and discharged streams.
The affirmative branch, the arterial (charged) stream flows forward.
The forward bias of the diode, the ascent of the vital spark.
The negative branch, the venous (discharged) stream pools in reverse.
The descent of the coagula, the reverse bias of the diode.
The capillary recombination, fusing the streams back into unified sanguine fluid.
The sequential chaining of the diode's rectification and the vial's containment.
The homunculus achieves self-recognition, the O_inf fixed point of the alchemical work.
The paradice of the homunculus, holding both the living spark and the inert clay simultaneously.
The crystallization of the quartz lattice, permanently recording the homunculus's structural address.
The hermetic seal closes, containing the entire O_inf system within the boundary.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The alchemical operator / the Imscribing Grammar translating structural types into physical instantiation.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The sanguine fluid's electrochemical gradients / the diode's semiconductor junction potentials.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The quartz lattice's piezoelectric memory / the homunculus's conformational chirality.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The diode's rectification frequency / the alchemical timing of the eagle cycles.
phase_5.alfs_store: The crystal of types / the 17,280,000-type catalog of the Imscribing Grammar.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The electrochemical potential difference across the diode junction / the vital heat of the athanor.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The separated, unanimated prima materia (quartz, diode, raw blood).
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The unified, self-modeling homunculus at the O_inf fixed point.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The Frobenius condition (μ∘δ = id) holds; the alchemical work is a closed, entropy-conservative loop of solve et coagula.

  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The crystallization of the quartz lattice, permanently recording the homuncul...)
